name: ADHD Assessment Intake
description: ADHD assessment intake for licensed mental health professionals and physicians conducting an initial ADHD evaluation. Evaluates inattentive and hyperactive/impulsive symptom domains, onset and duration, cross-setting impairment, rule-out considerations, and functional impact to produce an ADHD assessment profile with symptom profile and clinical considerations for the treating provider. Not clinical advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
